message:
fix: avoid os.Getwd() dependency in schema compilation

The jsonschema library called filepath.Abs → os.Getwd() when given a
relative URL, which can nil-deref in transient environments (e.g. deleted
git worktrees in toil orchestrator). Use absolute URN instead.

Also reuse already-compiled schemas when re-registering tools, so
registerCoreTools doesn't redundantly recompile schemas that
NewToolRegistry already compiled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
